THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF L.A. COMMERCIAL GROUP, INC.,A CORPORATION DBA CONTINENTAL COMMERCIAL GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIS ELECTRIC, INC.,A CORPORATION 1366 TURK STREET, LLC,A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $23,463.10 PRINCIPAL, $2,272.68 INTEREST, $188.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,923.78, -IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT SAID PROPERTY MAY BE SOLD BY THE SHERIFF OR MARSHAL OF THE COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND THAT THE PROCEEDS OF SAID SALE BE APPLIED FO SATISFY THE COSTS OF SALE AND TO SATISFY THE JUDGMENT. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
